meta.title: Fabian Seitz - FaserF
meta.description: Fabian Seitz - IT Administrator, Developer & Automation Expert. Specialized in Identity Management, Home Automation and System Integration. Developer of faneX-ID and other innovative projects.
meta.keywords: Fabian Seitz, IT Administrator, Developer, Identity Management, Home Assistant, SAP Basis, Microsoft Administration, Python, PowerShell, faneX-ID, AegisBot

home.name: I'm
home.subtitle: IT Administrator, Developer & Automation Expert
home.description: Passionate developer focused on Identity Management, Home Automation and System Integration. I develop innovative solutions that connect HR data with IT infrastructure and automate processes.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: I'm Fabian Seitz
about.vhsNote: Additionally, I am an IT lecturer at the VHS.
about.text1: As an IT Administrator and Developer with extensive experience in Microsoft Administration, SAP Basis and Automation, I develop innovative solutions for complex IT challenges.
about.text2: My expertise includes developing Identity Management systems that seamlessly connect HR data from enterprise systems with IT infrastructure (Active Directory, Microsoft Entra ID). With my project faneX-ID, I developed the idea, architecture, and project concept for a central platform that automatically manages the entire Employee Lifecycle. The technical implementation is done in a team.
about.text3: In addition to my professional work, I passionately develop Home Assistant integrations and add-ons that extend and automate smart home systems. My projects range from PowerShell automation scripts to Python-based system integrations to modern web applications. The complete concepts and architectures for projects with React and FastAPI are mine, while the technical implementation is done in teams.
about.text4: Additionally, I am engaged as an IT lecturer at the Adult Education Center (VHS), where I share my knowledge in IT topics and programming with interested learners. This activity allows me to convey complex technical concepts in an understandable way while continuously learning myself. More information about my VHS individual lessons.
about.text5a: My interest in technology began at a young age: I was fascinated by Android and custom ROMs early on and was very active on XDA Developers. There I actively participated in the community and learned a lot about Android development, custom ROMs, and system modifications.
about.text5: My commitment extends beyond professional work: I have volunteered for several years at the youth center in my community, where I supported and promoted young people in IT topics.
about.text6: The IT world is constantly evolving, and I keep pace: I continuously engage with new technologies and trends. Currently, I am diving deeper into the world of Artificial Intelligence (AI) to develop innovative solutions and explore the possibilities of this technology.
about.text7: I am particularly passionate about automation: I love identifying repetitive tasks and automating them through intelligent scripts and systems. Whether it's automating IT processes, home automation, or optimizing workflows - I find great joy in developing efficient solutions that save time and reduce errors.
about.text8: I am always committed to developing thoughtful, scalable and user-friendly solutions that solve real problems and make processes more efficient.
about.text9: In addition to my professional work, I am the founder and administrator of popular unofficial Telegram groups and channels. My largest projects are the TCL Android TV Updates community with over 17,000 members in the discussion group and over 45,000 subscribers in the news channel. For managing and automating these communities, I developed the idea for the AegisBot project, which I advance through testing, debugging, and continuous development.

faserf.title: The Story Behind FaserF
faserf.text1: As a child, I was called "Faser" by my friends - a funny and humorous nickname that was given to me.
faserf.text2: The trailing "F" stands for my first name Fabian, which is how the name FaserF came about.
faserf.text3: The name then primarily established itself in the gaming scene and thus became a fixed part of my user tag on the internet. Today I use it on GitHub, in projects and in the developer community.
faserf.backgroundNote: This image was my background in the past and has been preserved as a memory since then, even though it is outdated.

vhs.title: VHS Course Information
vhs.subtitle: Frequently asked questions about my IT individual lessons at the adult education center

price.question: How much does a lesson cost?
price.answer: A lesson costs 40€. One lesson corresponds to 45 minutes.

duration.question: Why does a lesson last 45 minutes?
duration.answer: A lesson of 45 minutes is the standard in adult education. This time unit allows for focused work without attention waning. This also corresponds to the usual practice at adult education centers.

billing.question: How does billing work?
billing.answer: Billing is handled directly through the adult education center. After each session, my service is signed by you. For billing, the VHS needs a registered IBAN. The VHS then automatically debits the money from your account.

iban.question: Where do I need to register my IBAN?
iban.answer: The IBAN must be filled in directly on the form you receive after completing the lesson. On this form, you also confirm that my service has been provided. The IBAN is needed so that the VHS can debit the course fees from your account.

offer.question: What individual lessons do I offer?
offer.answer: I do not offer courses, but individual one-on-one lessons. The topics are specialized and personalized to your needs. I offer everything around smartphones, tablets, notebooks, and computers. My experience includes: macOS (excellent experience), Windows (excellent experience), Linux (good experience), iOS (excellent experience), iPadOS (excellent experience), and Android (excellent experience).

experience.title: 10+ Years of Professional Experience
experience.text: Over a decade of practical experience in the IT industry with complex projects and systems.

complex.title: Complex IT Projects
complex.text: I work daily with very complex IT topics and projects in my main job - I bring this expertise into the classroom.

approach.title: Calm and Helpful Approach
approach.text: I teach with patience and understanding. Everyone learns at their own pace - I respect that.

solving.title: Solving Problems Together
solving.text: Problems are solved together with detailed explanations, so you not only get the solution but also understand how and why it works.

platforms.title: Comprehensive Platform Experience
platforms.text: I have comprehensive experience with all common operating systems and devices: macOS, Windows, Linux, iOS, iPadOS, and Android. No matter which device you use - I can help you.

availability.title: Availability & Booking Request
availability.description: Due to my full-time job, generally only times in the following ranges are possible, provided no other appointment or leisure plan exists:
availability.note: Important Note: All information is subject to change. I have a full-time main job and also pursue hobbies, so appointments can change at short notice. I ask for your understanding. Private appointments are not visible in my calendar, so not all free times may be available for bookings.

responsible.title: Responsible for Content
responsible.text: Responsible for content according to § 55 Abs. 2 RStV:

content.title: Liability for Content
content.text: The contents of our pages have been created with the greatest care. However, we cannot guarantee the accuracy, completeness and timeliness of the content. As a service provider, we are responsible for our own content on these pages in accordance with § 7 Abs.1 TMG under general law.

links.title: Liability for Links
links.text: Our offer contains links to external websites of third parties, on whose contents we have no influence. Therefore, we cannot assume any liability for these external contents. The respective provider or operator of the pages is always responsible for the contents of the linked pages.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Information on data protection according to GDPR

general.title: General Information
general.text: The following information provides a simple overview of what happens to your personal data when you visit this website. Personal data is any data with which you can be personally identified.

server.title: Server Log Files
server.text: The provider of the pages automatically collects and stores information in so-called server log files, which your browser automatically transmits to us. These are: browser type and browser version, operating system used, referrer URL, hostname of the accessing computer, time of the server request and IP address. A combination of this data with other data sources is not carried out.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.text: This website does not use cookies. No personal data is collected or stored via cookies.

contact.title: Contact Form
contact.text: If you send us inquiries via the contact form, your details from the inquiry form, including the contact details you provided there, will be stored by us for the purpose of processing the inquiry and in case of follow-up questions. We do not pass on this data without your consent.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.text: You have the right at any time to receive information about your personal data stored by us, its origin and recipient and the purpose of data processing. You also have a right to correction, blocking or deletion of this data. For this purpose and for further questions on the subject of data protection, you can contact us at any time at the address given in the imprint.
